notableEvents.label: Willi Castro plunked
notableEvents.detail: Willi Castro hit by pitch. TJ Rumfield to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Heriberto Hernández pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández flies out to right fielder Jake McCarthy. Xavier Edwards to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Xavier Edwards GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Xavier Edwards grounds into a double play, shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Kyle Stowers out at 2nd. Xavier Edwards out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Heriberto Hernández pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández lines out sharply to center fielder Cole Carrigg.
